subcodes.first_line: O Rahim! Render praise unto the Beloved of the world, for thy letter hath attained unto the Most Great Paradise, and that which thou didst submit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رحیم حمد کن محبوب عالمرا که مکتوبت بفردوس اعظم فائز شد و آنچه عرض نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
